# ClipNest | Media Downloader

ClipNest is a professional-grade tool designed for high-quality media extraction from YouTube, Instagram, and Facebook. It focuses on speed, security, and user privacy.

## Core Features
- YouTube to MP4/MP3 (up to 4K and 320kbps)
- Instagram Reels & Story Downloader
- Facebook Video Downloader
- Fast server-side extraction engine
- Zero-logs privacy policy

## Technical Architecture
- Backend: Node.js / Express
- Templating: EJS (Server-Side Rendering)
- Engine: yt-dlp
- Deployment: Docker on Render

## Content Permissions
- Only publicly accessible content is allowed for extraction.
- Users are responsible for complying with the terms of service of the respective platforms.
